analysis.name: VANGUARD TARGET RETIREMENT 2050 FUND

bid_ask_spread_cost.methodology: Bid-ask spread estimated from N-PORT asset class weights and portfolio turnover. Spread assumptions based on asset-class-specific averages. Formula: turnover x 2 x weighted avg one-way spread.

market_impact_cost.methodology: Market impact estimated using regression-weighted blend of equity and fixed income impact assumptions. Bond weight: 0%, small-cap weight: 0%. Based on Edelen, Evans, and Kadlec (2007). Directional estimate.
